channel.title: Is Milly in Melbourne?
channel.description: Whether Milly is currently in Melbourne. A new entry appears whenever her location changes.

item.title: Milly is in Melbourne
item.description: Milly is currently in Melbourne, business as usual. (Home in Melbourne — flew back from Sydney on 22 Jul (Virgin FRNGWA, SYD→MEL arriving ~7:05 PM). Hotel checkout and trip-receipt emails confirm the Sydney trip is done.)

item.title: Milly is in Sydney
item.description: Milly is currently in Sydney. (Flying to Sydney this evening (VA887, MEL 7:30 PM → SYD 8:55 PM). In Sydney through 22 Jul for the Macquarie Bank 'AI x Design' talk (50 Martin Place) and union delegate training; returns on VA882.)

item.title: Milly is in Melbourne
item.description: Milly is currently in Melbourne, business as usual. (Full week of Melbourne-based events (choir, vet, Carlton meetup); no travel bookings in email.)
